target_persona.profile: litigation paralegal at small US law firm
target_persona.primary_pain: Manually indexing deposition transcripts for trial prep

jobs_to_be_done.functional: Auto-index deposition transcripts with cite-pin to PDF page
jobs_to_be_done.emotional: Confidence that no contradiction was missed before trial
jobs_to_be_done.social: Be the paralegal partners trust with deposition prep

killer_feature: Cite-pinned contradiction detection across multi-witness depositions
success_metric: Average minutes saved per deposition prep
